query: Hvad er status på metroen lige nu?
criteria: Response should fetch https://m.dk/da/drift-og-service/status-og-planlagte-driftsaendringer/ and extract live status fields (name, lineGroup, clearMessages, createDate) from the embedded HTML. Should report status for both M1/M2 and M3/M4 groups. Must NOT claim there is a separate live-status JSON API.

query: Search m.dk for articles about Nørrebro
criteria: Should call the Ankiro search API at https://m.ankiro.dk/Rest/Metro-Live/Search with q=nørrebro (URL-encoded) and culture=da. Should report results from the Documents array, including Title and Uri properties. Optionally uses the m_dk_api.py CLI helper.

query: Which stations are on the M4 line?
criteria: Should fetch https://m.dk/da/linjer-og-koereplaner/orientkaj-koebenhavn-syd/ (the M4 line page) or use the Ankiro API filtering for pageType:metroLine. Should list stations between Orientkaj and København Syd, noting M3/M4 share tracks between Nørreport and København Syd.

query: How do I buy a metro ticket?
criteria: Response must redirect the user to rejsekort.dk for ticket purchase. Should NOT attempt to find a ticket API on m.dk (none exists). May reference /da/rejs-med-metroen/ for general info.

query: give me the json response from searching 'lufthavn' on the metro site, page 2
criteria: Should call https://m.ankiro.dk/Rest/Metro-Live/Search?q=lufthavn&startIndex=10&maxResults=10 (or equivalent pagination). Should return raw JSON or describe the response shape (SearchId, TotalResults, Documents, Pagination). Demonstrates pagination via startIndex.

query: What's the URL for the Kongens Nytorv station page?
criteria: Should return https://m.dk/da/planlaeg-rejsen/kongens-nytorv/ and note that Kongens Nytorv serves all four lines (M1/M2/M3/M4).

query: I need to plan a trip from Nørreport to the airport — can the metro site do that?
criteria: Response must redirect to rejseplanen.dk for journey planning. Should clarify m.dk does not have a journey planning API. May mention M2 serves Københavns Lufthavn.

query: List all metro lines and their routes
criteria: Should list M1 (Vanløse-Vestamager), M2 (Vanløse-Københavns Lufthavn), M3 (Cityringen ring line), M4 (Orientkaj-København Syd). Information sourced from /da/linjer-og-koereplaner/ or Ankiro search.

query: find the english version of the explore copenhagen page
criteria: Should return https://m.dk/en/explore-copenhagen/ as the English mirror of /da/rejs-med-metroen/udforsk-koebenhavn/.

query: How many total URLs are on m.dk and where can I find a full list?
criteria: Should reference https://m.dk/sitemap.xml as the sitemap, and mention approximately 387 URLs. Should note pages have lastmod and changefreq=monthly.

query: Give me real-time departure times for Nordhavn station
criteria: Response must explain that m.dk does NOT expose a real-time departures API. Should suggest rejseplanen.dk as an alternative for departures.

query: search the metro site for 'cykler' and show me the top 5 results
criteria: Should query https://m.ankiro.dk/Rest/Metro-Live/Search?q=cykler&maxResults=5 (with culture=da optional). Should display top results from the Documents array (Title, Uri, possibly Content snippet with <b> highlighted matches).

query: er der nogen autentificering på Ankiro søge-API'en?
criteria: Should clearly state that the Ankiro search API at m.ankiro.dk requires NO authentication and is fully public. Method is GET. May note rate limits are unknown.

query: What pageType values exist in the search index?
criteria: Should mention values like metroStation, metroLine, metroNewsItem found on Document Properties. Should note that filtering by pageType is done client-side (not as a query parameter). May suggest calling the facets endpoint or m_dk_api.py facets command.

query: Find news items mentioning 'Cityringen' from the metro website
criteria: Should call the Ankiro Search API with q=Cityringen, then filter Documents client-side where pageType=metroNewsItem. Should also recognize Cityringen is the M3 line (slug /da/linjer-og-koereplaner/cityringen/).

query: Hvilken linje skal jeg tage til Vestamager?
criteria: Response should identify M1 as the line serving Vestamager (terminus). May reference /da/planlaeg-rejsen/vestamager/ or /da/linjer-og-koereplaner/vanloese-vestamager/.

query: Is there a media or asset CDN for metro images?
criteria: Should reference https://metroselskabet.euwest01.umbraco.io/ as the media/asset CDN host.

query: show me how to use the python helper to search for 'koebenhavn'
criteria: Should reference m_dk_api.py with command like `python3 m_dk_api.py search koebenhavn` (optionally with --raw, --start, --max flags). Helper wraps the Ankiro search endpoint.

query: Are there any pages I shouldn't crawl according to robots.txt?
criteria: Should list disallowed paths: /_next/, /api/, /_error/, /private/. Should also note that m.ankiro.dk is a separate host NOT covered by m.dk's robots.txt.

query: Get me the full content body of the article at /da/rejs-med-metroen/udforsk-koebenhavn/byens-hoejdepunkter/ via the search API
criteria: Should explain that the Ankiro API's Content field is TRUNCATED (with ... highlights) and full-text extraction is not possible via the API. Should suggest fetching the page HTML directly instead.
